title: Chinook’s – Anthony's Restaurants
content: IT'S NORTHWEST BERRY SEASON! # Chinook's at Salmon Bay. Waterfront Dining in Ballard at Fishermans Terminal. ## the best seafood in seattle. Chinook’s at Salmon Bay is a Seattle waterfront seafood restaurant located in historic Fishermen’s Terminal, the longtime home of the North Pacific fishing fleet. Surrounded by commercial fishing vessels and maritime activity, Chinook’s offers an authentic Pacific Northwest dining experience featuring fresh Northwest seafood, wild Alaska salmon, Dungeness crab, award-winning clam chowder, fish and chips, and seasonal seafood specialties. With waterfront views, a casual atmosphere, and a deep connection to Seattle’s fishing heritage, Chinook’s is a favorite destination for locals and visitors seeking the freshest seafood in Seattle near Ballard, Magnolia, and downtown Seattle. Chicken, crisp romaine, Parmesan, homemade croutons and our own Caesar dressing. Our classic caesar salad with crispy calamari. Fresh Northwest mussels, Manila clams, lingcod and salmon in tomato-basil stew with garlic and fennel. Alder planked wild salmon with red pepper beurre blanc paired with a Dungeness crab cake.
